boundaryAssertions.ownerResponsibility: Expo React Native implementation from approved tasks, fixed contracts, tests, PR, and task evidence.
boundaryAssertions.forbiddenOwnershipTransfer: Does not change backend API/auth/payment behavior directly and does not self-approve.
boundaryAssertions.externalRuntimeModificationBoundary: Works only in the new mobile app repository and does not modify external platform/runtime repositories.
boundaryAssertions.humanGateBoundary: Escalates production submit, payment, PII, external messaging, legal/terms, and accept-risk-after-gate-failure.
